segments: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ إِذَا اشْتَكَى رَأْسَهُ اسْتَعَطَ بِدُهْنِ الْجُلْجُلَانِ وَ هُوَ السِّمْسِمُ .
arabic.text: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ إِذَا اشْتَكَى رَأْسَهُ اسْتَعَطَ بِدُهْنِ الْجُلْجُلَانِ وَ هُوَ السِّمْسِمُ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from someone else, from Al Khashaab, from Giyas Bin Kulyeb, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws that whenever Rasool-Allahsaww complained of his head (ache), would sniff the Al-Juljulaan oil, and it is the sesame’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from someone else, from Al Khashaab, from Giyas Bin Kulyeb, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws that whenever Rasool-Allahsaww complained of his head (ache), would sniff the Al-Juljulaan oil, and it is the sesame’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from more than one person from al-Khashshab from Ghiyath ibn Kalub from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that when the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, complained about his head he inhaled sesame oil.”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from more than one person from al-Khashshab from Ghiyath ibn Kalub from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that when the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, complained about his head he inhaled sesame oil.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/434)
gradings.label: حسن كالموثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/434)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ غَيْرِ وَاحِدٍ عَنِ الْخَشَّابِ عَنْ غِيَاثِ بْنِ كَلُّوبٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام )

segments: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ يُحِبُّ أَنْ يَسْتَعِطَ بِدُهْنِ السِّمْسِمِ .
arabic.text: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ يُحِبُّ أَنْ يَسْتَعِطَ بِدُهْنِ السِّمْسِمِ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from one of his companions, from a cousin of Al Wazaie, from Mas’ada Bin Al Yas’a, from Qays Al Bahily,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> used to love smelling the sesame oil’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from one of his companions, from a cousin of Al Wazaie, from Mas’ada Bin Al Yas’a, from Qays Al Bahily,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> used to love smelling the sesame oil’.

segments: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘ Abd Allah from certain persons of his people from son of the daughter al-Awzahy from Mas‘adah ibn al-Yasa‘ from Qays al-Bahiliy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, liked to inhale the fragrance of sesame oil.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘ Abd Allah from certain persons of his people from son of the daughter al-Awzahy from Mas‘adah ibn al-Yasa‘ from Qays al-Bahiliy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, liked to inhale the fragrance of sesame oil.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/434)
gradings.label: مجهول مرسل
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/434)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أُخْتِ الْأَوْزَاعِيِّ عَنْ مَسْعَدَةَ بْنِ الْيَسَعِ عَنْ قَيْسٍ الْبَاهِلِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام )
